settings.question: Is the peptide from jellyfish?

settings.heading: DNA Repair Ritual

settings.pro_tip_quote: For an enhanced regenerative effect, use this serum in conjunction with our Ultimate A Night Cream. The combination of DNA repair peptides and Retinol provides a comprehensive approach.

settings.title: Cleanse
settings.description: Start with a thoroughly cleansed and dry face, morning and night.

settings.title: Apply
settings.description: Dispense 1-2 pumps of the serum onto your fingertips.

settings.title: Distribute
settings.description: Gently press and massage the serum evenly over face, neck, and décolletage.

settings.title: Follow
settings.description: Allow the serum to fully absorb before applying your moisturiser or SPF.

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.subheading: Scientific answers to your longevity questions.

settings.question: How is this different from other anti-ageing serums?
settings.answer: Focuses on DNA repair, a foundational aspect of skin ageing. By targeting cellular health with the Juveleven™ peptide, it goes beyond surface-level treatments.

settings.question: Is the 'jellyfish peptide' actually from jellyfish?
settings.answer: No. It is a 100% lab-synthesised, vegan ingredient. It's bio-inspired by the Turritopsis dohrnii jellyfish’s repair mechanisms.

settings.question: Can I use this serum with retinol?
settings.answer: Absolutely. It pairs exceptionally well with Retinoids at night to support the skin's natural repair cycle.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: DNA repair benefits begin within hours, while wrinkle reduction and collagen improvements become pronounced over 4-8 weeks.

settings.question: Can I use this if I have sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Yes, this formula was designed to be both potent and gentle. Squalene and Sodium Hyaluronate are excellent for soothing sensitive skin.
